allow: PowerShell($paths = @\("$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs\\node.exe","${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\nodejs\\node.exe","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\nodejs\\node.exe","$env:APPDATA\\npm\\node.exe","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\fnm","$env:USERPROFILE\\.nvm","$env:USERPROFILE\\scoop\\apps\\nodejs"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $p" } }; Write-Output "--- winget check ---"; try { \(Get-Command winget\).Source } catch { 'no winget' })
